purpose: Increase tradable episode frequency without weakening the external-liquidity anchor. Reuse only causal N20 signal time, side and level, then trade independent completed-15m pullback and reacceleration episodes. Future N20 trade outcomes are forbidden.

n20_state.source: frozen quality-core candidate file; read only symbol, signal_time, side and level
n20_state.replacement: a later N20 signal on the same symbol replaces the prior state
n20_state.invalidation: first completed 15m close back inside the N20 level or maximum age, whichever occurs first

pullback_types.EMA20_RECLAIM: within the prior pullback window, LONG has low<=bar EMA20 and close>=EMA20; SHORT symmetric
pullback_types.N20_LEVEL_RECLAIM: within the prior pullback window, price tests within 0.25 prior ATR15 of the active N20 level and closes on the active side

episode.reacceleration: decision close breaks the directional extreme of the prior completed breakout-lookback bars
episode.raw_event_cooldown: four completed 15m bars per N20 regime, applied before quality thresholds
episode.entry: actual next 1m open equal to decision-bar close

canonical.stop: far extreme of pullback lookback plus decision bar, buffered 0.10 prior ATR15

costs.historical_funding: apply exact settled funding only in post-selection replay

selection.score: maximize min development/validation lb80 mean R, then min PF, then R per operating day
